name: Chernihiv Oblast (Ukraine)
description: A green field with a central white band, charged with the coat of arms (a black eagle).
history: Designed by I. Sytyi, A. Hrechylo, and I. Pavlenko and officially adopted on 11 July 2000 by the Chernihiv Oblast Council. The arms derive from the medieval seal of the Chernihiv Principality.

features.role: historic arms of Chernihiv (Saint Vladimir with the Chernihiv eagle)
features.symbolism: the heritage of the medieval Chernihiv Principality
